_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PTERODACTYL PANEL - PTERODACTYL.IO
name: TFS Game Server
author: alexveley
description: The Forgotten Server (TFS) game server only. Create a database for this server in the Databases tab, then paste the connection details into Startup Variables. Use with MyAAC web server egg for the account/game panel (same database).

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
set -euo pipefail

echo "=== TFS GAME SERVER INSTALLER ==="

SERVER_DIR="/mnt/server"
cd "$SERVER_DIR"

# ------------------------
# Ensure tools
# ------------------------
if ! command -v git >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  apt-get update
  apt-get install -y \
    git \
    curl \
    unzip \
    openssl \
    ca-certificates
fi

# ------------------------
# TFS datapack
# ------------------------
if [ ! -d data ]; then
  echo "Installing TFS datapack..."
  git clone --depth=1 --branch v1.6 https://github.com/otland/forgottenserver.git tfs-src
  cp -r tfs-src/data .
  cp tfs-src/config.lua.dist ./config.lua
  cp tfs-src/schema.sql .
  rm -rf tfs-src
else
  echo "Datapack already present."
fi

# ------------------------
# RSA key
# ------------------------
if [ ! -f key.pem ]; then
  echo "Generating RSA key..."
  openssl genpkey -algorithm RSA -out key.pem -pkeyopt rsa_keygen_bits:2048
  chmod 600 key.pem
fi

echo "=== TFS INSTALLER END ==="

variables.name: Login Port
variables.description: Login protocol port (e.g. 7171). Assign this allocation to the server.

variables.name: Game Port
variables.description: Game protocol port (e.g. 7172). Assign this allocation to the server.

variables.name: Web Port
variables.description: TFS HTTP port (optional). Leave default if not used.

variables.name: MySQL Host
variables.description: Create a database for this server in the Databases tab, then paste the host here.

variables.name: MySQL User
variables.description: Database username from the Databases tab.

variables.name: MySQL Password
variables.description: Database password from the Databases tab.

variables.name: MySQL Database
variables.description: Database name from the Databases tab.
